description: An LLM-guided hybrid rush bot that consults Ollama to pick between WorkerRush, LightRush, HeavyRush, and RangedRush based on visible enemy composition and map size tier. Falls back to a counter-triangle heuristic (Light beats Ranged, Heavy beats Light, Ranged beats Heavy; WorkerRush for tiny maps or emergency base defense) if the model is unavailable.
